description_long: This is an ornate goblet-style cup with a wide, shallow bowl and a sturdy, decorative stem. The cup is primarily gold in color, featuring a textured surface with a rope-like rim and geometric engravings. Around the bowl, there are several large, faceted red gemstones set in raised, circular bezels, adding a luxurious and ceremonial appearance. The stem is ribbed and flares out into a broad, round base adorned with smaller blue stones embedded in a patterned arrangement. The overall design suggests a ceremonial or decorative use, possibly for display or special occasions. The interior appears to be smooth and metallic, matching the exterior's golden finish.
description: A gold, gem-encrusted goblet with a wide bowl, ornate stem, and decorative base, featuring red and blue gemstones. The cup has a luxurious, ceremonial appearance with detailed engravings and embellishments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide gold bowl, three prominent red gemstones, and the detailed base with blue stones.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the curvature of the bowl and the arrangement of the red gemstones around the cup.
description_view_2: Another angled view emphasizing the symmetry of the gemstone placements and the ornate stem details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back side of the cup, with the same decorative elements and gemstone distribution as the front.
